summary: Iteration 3 footer verification for Method B2B site. Focused checks: footer wordmark now matches header wordmark size exactly at both viewports; column order is Wordmark / Site / Contact; LinkedIn and email link attributes preserved; footer suppressed on /connect; regressions on Home/Work/Writing/Detail pages all pass; zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx & Nav.jsx share the same wordmark class string ('plain wordmark ... text-[1.65rem] md:text-[2rem] leading-none'). Consider extracting to a shared constant/component to prevent future drift, though duplication is minimal (2 sites).

Footer email anchor uses class 'break-all' which causes the address to visually wrap mid-word ('...co / m' at ~1920 desktop as observed in screenshot). Acceptable for narrow contact column, but consider 'break-words' or shrinking font for cleaner wrap.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only marketing site. Footer wordmark and header wordmark share Tailwind classes text-[1.65rem] md:text-[2rem] leading-none — computed to 26.4px mobile and 32px desktop. Column order at md+: col-span-6 Wordmark, col-span-3 Site, col-span-3 Contact. Footer is intentionally not rendered on /connect. Work index has 2 cards; Writing index has 8 posts. Detail routes: /work/:slug and /writing/:slug carry Save-PDF buttons with testids work-detail-save-pdf / writing-detail-save-pdf.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
